title: Selenis (Evertis is also involved) ransomware incident

extortion.description: Selenis is part of the IMG Group, a family-owned multinational with presence in the polymers industry since 1959. Selenis is a premium supplier of innovative copolyesters for a diverse range of applications. We are going to upload more than 70GB of essential corporate documents such as: a lot of detailed client personal information and documents (passports, medical records, drivers licenses), confidential court files, financial data of clients, NDAs, etc.
